creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text: Seems difficult to test the exact scenario at this point, but I've updated harfbuzz via pkg several times and the link is always there, and there's nothing port specific about the link creation AFAIK. Perhaps there was some bug in an older version of pkg, I'm not sure. Anyway, at this point, I think it's safe to close this bug. Please re-open if needed.
